subjects.description: A couple of translucent white stray polythene plastic bags on the drizzle-wet asphalt, damp and softly matte, lightly crumpled and partially lifted by the breeze
subjects.appearance_details: Thin, semi-transparent plastic dampened by drizzle, softly matte with a faint dull sheen, edges clinging and creased, grimed and limp in the humid air
subjects.relationship: Loose debris on the road ahead of the moving ego vehicle, harmless obstacles being ignored
subjects.location: center foreground to lower-center of frame, on the road ahead
subjects.orientation: Tumbling and shifting, no fixed orientation
subjects.pose: Crumpled and partially lifted, drifting along the asphalt
subjects.action: Being tossed and skittered across the road by gusts of wind
subjects.state_changes: Bags shift position, lift briefly, and tumble as the vehicle approaches and passes near them

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, implied by the first-person dashboard-level point of view, traveling forward along a wet commercial-strip lane
subjects.appearance_details: Front hood edge faintly visible at the bottom of the frame, windshield framing the view of the road ahead
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle whose perspective the entire video is shot from
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible lower frame
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road, aligned with the camera
subjects.pose: Driving steadily forward in its lane
subjects.action: Maintaining consistent speed and lane position
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; continues straight at constant speed

background_setting: A commercial strip in a Latin American town under a grey overcast sky with a light drizzle, worn asphalt darkened and faintly sheened with wet, marked by fading lines. Colorful low storefronts with hand-painted signs, awnings, and roll-up shutters line both sides; power lines sag overhead and spring foliage sprouts from a few planters. Sparse traffic and a parked motorbike sit along the wet curb in the damp, flat light.

lighting.conditions: Overcast day with light drizzle, dim flat light
lighting.direction: Even, dim light from the whole grey sky; no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Weak, soft, near-absent shadows under the flat overcast
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat grey light with a faint wet sheen on the road; the two translucent bags look damp and softly matte, picking up a faint dull sheen from the drizzle as they drift over the wet asphalt

aesthetics.composition: First-person driving perspective with the strip vanishing toward a central point, hood edge anchoring the bottom, the two bags in the central foreground
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys of overcast and wet asphalt, faded storefront colors softened by the damp, and dull-white drizzle-damp bags
aesthetics.patterns: Rows of low storefronts, sagging power lines, and faint wet lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle, steady and smooth
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the road ahead
cinematography.focus: The road ahead and the two damp bags in the central foreground under the flat drizzly light

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle ignoring harmless road debris

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward steadily along the drizzly commercial strip; two stray polythene bags appear ahead on the wet asphalt, damp and dull as they flutter.
The vehicle continues at constant speed; the bags tumble and skitter across the wet road as the gap closes.
The vehicle maintains its lane and speed, passing near the bags without deviation as they drift aside in the breeze.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward on the commercial strip under grey overcast drizzle; two damp polythene bags become visible ahead, tossed by the breeze.
segments.key_changes: Bags appear in the central foreground, dull and drizzle-damp, and begin to flutter.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking from dashboard view.

segments.description: The vehicle holds speed and lane as the bags tumble across the wet road surface.
segments.key_changes: Bags shift and lift limply in the damp gusts.

segments.description: The vehicle maintains its course and passes near the bags, ignoring them entirely as they drift aside.
segments.key_changes: Bags pass out of central frame; the wet road ahead stays clear.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward along a Latin American commercial strip under grey overcast with a light drizzle, worn asphalt faintly sheened and colorful storefronts lining the way. Within the first two seconds, two translucent polythene bags come into view in the central foreground, damp and softly matte as they lift and flutter in the breeze. From 0:02 to 0:03 the vehicle holds constant speed and lane position as the bags tumble and skitter across the wet road. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle continues without deviation, passing near the bags and ignoring them as they drift aside, the road ahead remaining clear under the flat drizzly light.
audio_description: Ambient small-town drizzle sounds: the hum of the engine and the faint wet hiss of tires on damp asphalt, light drizzle patter, distant street chatter and a passing motorbike. No speech or music; the soft damp rustle of plastic bags in the breeze.
